title: The Mysterious Magician
writer: Herbert Reinecker, Edgar Wallace, Harald G. Petersson
actors: Joachim Fuchsberger, Heinz Drache, Sophie Hardy
plot: The sister of the criminal named "Hexer" is murdered. Scotland Yard Inspector Higgins believes that the criminal will surface to take his revenge and plans to set a trap to finally capture him. However, bodies soon start piling up.
